---
description: Implement the next task incrementally: RED → GREEN → regression → commit.
---

Invoke the coding-guard 'test-driven-development' skill.

Pick the next pending task from tasks/plan.md. For each task:
1. Read acceptance criteria
2. Write a failing test (RED) — paste the failing assertion
3. Implement the minimum code to pass (GREEN)
4. Run the full test suite for regressions
5. Run the build to verify compilation
6. Commit with a descriptive message
7. Mark the task complete and stop

If a step fails twice the same way, stop and invoke /cg:debug instead.
